86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham
B15 3JG.    0121-454-3730.

2008 July.

The favourite painting of Eugenio Triana Sr. at the Prado
[illegible] by Francisco de Goya
photo_captions: The favourite painting of Eugenio Triana Sr. at the Prado [illegible] by Francisco de Goya
pages.notes: Top of page contains an address: 86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston, Birmingham B15 3JG with phone number 0121-454-3730 — possibly a contact note inserted here. Below that '2008 July' gives the date. At the bottom is a partially visible caption for the photograph on the facing page. The second line of the caption is cut off at the page edge; it likely reads something like '[Saturn devouring his son / a seated countess] by Francisco de Goya'. The right half of the spread is a glued-in or pasted postcard/photo of a Goya painting (a woman in white seated in a gold chair).

Full-page photograph or postcard of a Goya painting: a woman in a white/silver dress seated in a gold armchair, with a decorative headpiece. No handwritten text on this page. The caption for this image appears at the bottom of the left (L) page.
